community.title: 커뮤니티
community.dummy_post1_content:
It has been 3 months since I had double eyelid surgery at Gangnam Beauty Clinic.

Swelling lasted about 2 weeks after surgery, and it looked natural after about a month and a half.
The doctor communicated well in English, so there was no inconvenience even as a foreigner.

The price was 1,500,000 KRW, which included 2 aftercare sessions.
Overall very satisfied and considering rhinoplasty next time.
community.dummy_post4_title: Which clinic is good for first-time Botox?
community.dummy_post5_title: How long does swelling last after rhinoplasty?

about.title: 한국 뷰티 의료의 신뢰할 수 있는 파트너
about.description: 투비스토리는 2008년부터 한국의 우수한 의료기관과 전 세계 고객을 연결해 온 의료관광 전문 기업입니다.
about.experience: 2008년부터 500여개 병원과 함께한 한국 뷰티 마케팅 전문기업
about.mission_desc: KBBG는 외국인 환자가 한국에서 안전하고 만족스러운 의료·미용 서비스를 받을 수 있도록 검증된 정보와 AI 기반 맞춤 추천을 제공합니다.
about.expertise_desc: 투비스토리는 2008년부터 500여개 병원의 마케팅을 대행하며 한국 의료 시장을 깊이 이해하고 있습니다.
about.trust_desc: 광고 표시를 명확히 하고, 후원 콘텐츠와 편집 콘텐츠를 구분합니다. 개인정보는 GDPR 및 한국 개인정보보호법을 준수하여 처리합니다.
about.partnership_desc: 병원 등록 및 마케팅 협력에 관심 있으신가요?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_title: 1. Purpose of Collection and Use of Personal Information
privacy.s1_intro: 2bStory (hereinafter "Company") collects and uses personal information for the following purposes:
privacy.s1_item1: Providing AI-powered personalized clinic recommendation services
privacy.s3_title: 3. Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
privacy.s3_body: In principle, the Company does not provide users' personal information to external parties. Exceptions apply when required by law or requested by relevant authorities for investigation purposes.
privacy.s4_body: The service uses cookies to improve services and enhance user experience. You may refuse cookies through your browser settings, but some services may be restricted.
privacy.s5_intro: Users may exercise the following rights at any time:
privacy.s5_item2: Request to correct or delete personal information
privacy.s5_item3: Request to suspend processing of personal information
privacy.s5_contact_prefix: To exercise your rights, please contact

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: These terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the KBBG service (hereinafter "Service") operated by 2bStory (hereinafter "Company"), and define the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of the Company and users.
terms.s2_item1: "Service" refers to the Korean beauty clinic information and AI recommendation service provided by the Company.
terms.s2_item2: "User" refers to any person who uses the Service provided by the Company under these terms.
terms.s2_item3: "Content" refers to all information posted by users within the Service, including posts, comments, and images.
terms.s3_body: These terms take effect upon posting on the initial screen of the Service. The Company may amend these terms for reasonable reasons, and amended terms will be notified 7 days in advance.
terms.s4_intro: The Company provides the following services:
terms.s4_item4: Other services determined by the Company
terms.s5_intro: Users must not engage in the following acts:
terms.s5_item1: Collecting or using others' personal information without authorization
terms.s5_item2: Interfering with stable operation of the Service
terms.s5_item3: Posting false information or deceiving others
terms.s5_item4: Infringing on copyrights or other intellectual property rights
terms.s6_body: The Company strives for accuracy of clinic information posted on the Service but does not guarantee it. Medical procedure decisions must be made after consultation with a qualified specialist.
terms.s7_body: Disputes arising from the use of the Service shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and the Seoul Central District Court shall have jurisdiction.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.warning: ⚠️ Important: The information on this service does not replace medical advice. All medical procedure decisions must be made after consulting with a qualified medical professional.
disclaimer.s1_body: All content provided by KBBG (including clinic information, AI recommendations, and community posts) is provided for general reference purposes only. This service does not provide professional medical diagnosis, treatment, or advice.
disclaimer.s2_body: The Company strives to maintain the accuracy of posted clinic information, procedure prices, and reviews, but does not guarantee it. Due to the nature of the medical field, information may change rapidly, so please verify directly with the clinic before visiting.
disclaimer.s3_body: AI recommendation results are generated based on limited information entered by the user. The results are for reference only and do not consider personal health conditions, medical history, allergies, or other medical factors. Please consult with a medical professional before making final decisions about clinics or procedures.
disclaimer.s4_body: Some content and clinic recommendations may be provided through advertising or paid partnerships. Advertising content is clearly labeled with an "Ad" label. Regardless of advertising status, all clinic information is verified using the same standards.
disclaimer.s5_body: External links in the Service are provided for convenience, and the Company is not responsible for the content of linked external sites.
disclaimer.s6_body: The Company shall not be liable for direct, indirect, or incidental damages arising from the use of the Service, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law. However, damages caused by the Company's intentional misconduct or gross negligence are exceptions.
disclaimer.s7_contact_prefix: For inquiries regarding this disclaimer, please contact
